name: draft
description: Ephemeral scratchpad scaffolder — `/draft <slug>` creates `drafts/<slug>.md` for temporary working notes designed to be discarded. The `drafts/` dir is auto-added to .gitignore so files never commit by accident. Verbs — bare/`list` = enumerate (mtime-sorted) · `<slug>` = scaffold a new draft with a template (entries section + timestamp) · `add <slug> <content...>` = append a timestamped bullet (auto-scaffolds if the file is missing — single-call create-and-add path) · `rm <slug>` = delete a single draft (no confirm since drafts are throwaway by design) · `clean` = list `rm` candidates (read-only; user runs the actual `rm -rf drafts` or `/draft rm <slug>`). LLM AUTO-REGISTRATION — the description in SKILL.md instructs the calling LLM to recognize natural-language signals ("이거 등록해줘"/"메모"/"적어둬"/"기록"/"register this"/"jot down"/"이것도") and proactively run `/draft add <slug> <distilled content>` without waiting for an explicit command, picking a slug by first checking existing drafts (reuse if related) else deriving a kebab-case slug from the subject domain. Symmetric deletion triggers ("삭제"/"지워"/"폐기"/"delete that note") map to `/draft rm <slug>`. Distinct from `/inbox` (which scaffolds into a typed taxonomy `notes`/`patches`/`poc`/`rfc_drafts` intended for eventual upgrade): `/draft` files are explicitly throwaway. Slug accepts alnum / dash / underscore / dot only. Plugin command (markdown-only, no script). Triggers: /draft · 드래프트 · draft 만들어 · 임시 메모 · scratchpad · 정리 노트 · 나중 폐기 · 이거 등록해줘 · 메모해줘 · 적어둬 · 기록해놔 · register this · jot down · delete that note · 그 메모 지워.
